MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON JAN-12-2011 IN 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT LATASHA KELLOM'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT WITH COUNSEL JOHN CARELLA. THE COURT GRANTED THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY GIVEN TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: KATHERINE FEINSTEIN; CLERK: E. BURA; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)

MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON JAN-12-2011 IN 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT LATASHA KELLOM'S WAIVER OF ADDITIONAL COURT FEES AND COSTS. APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT WITH COUNSEL JOHN CARELLA. THE COURT DENIES WITHOUT PREJUDICE THE APPLICATION AS TO JURY FEES AND EXPENSES AND COURT REPORTER FEES. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY GIVEN TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: KATHERINE FEINSTEIN; CLERK: E. BURA; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
